name: Sarah Guo
note: Hi Sarah, we met at an OpenAI hackathon in SF before. I just saw your profile come up on my feed and would love to connect.

name: Chemistry
note: Hi Chemistry team, I admire the high-conviction approach, backing just a handful of seed and Series A companies with real focus rather than spraying bets. I'm genuinely excited to see who you go all in on next. Would love to connect.

name: Long Journey Ventures
note: Hi Long Journey team, congrats on closing Fund IV. I love your instinct for being the second believers in the magically weird, backing founders others call ridiculous. I'm excited to see which strange, wonderful bets come next. Would love to connect.

name: Nathan Benaich
note: Hi Nathan, the State of AI Report is a must-read for me every year, and Air Street's conviction in AI-first companies really stands out. I'm excited to see what you back and publish next. Would love to connect.

name: 181 Angels
note: Hi 181 Angels team, I love that you pair real capital with 150+ operators from the Founders Forum world to back pre-seed and seed founders. That blend of smart money and hands-on help is rare. Excited to see who you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Terrence Rohan
note: Hi Terrence, I love how Otherwise reimagines the founder-angel model and lets founders back their peers. Your early bets on Figma and Notion are legendary. I'm excited to see what you fund next. Would love to connect.

name: Kyle Parrish
note: Hi Kyle, congrats on joining Craft Ventures as Partner! After scaling Figma's sales from $2M to nearly $1B ARR, I'm genuinely excited to see the founders you back. Would love to connect.

name: Lenny Rachitsky
note: Hi Lenny, your newsletter is a daily must-read for me, and 140+ angel investments with a dozen unicorns is remarkable. I'm excited to see who you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Cyan Banister
note: Hi Cyan, congrats on closing Long Journey IV. I love that you back the magical weirdos others overlook, and your instinct for outliers is unmatched. I'm excited to see who you find next. Would love to connect.

name: Vivek Sodera
note: Hi Vivek, I love what you're building with Supercharge, backing early enterprise AI and dev tools founders. After co-founding Superhuman, your product instincts are the real edge. Excited to see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Danielle Strachman
note: Hi Danielle, what you do at 1517 backing dropouts and deep-tech scientists at the earliest stage is inspiring, and spotting talent like Dylan Field early is incredible. Excited to see who you find next. Would love to connect.

name: Alana Goyal
note: Hi Alana, I admire how you run Basecase, backing deeply technical founders at the pre-idea stage through real conversations. That portfolio (Vercel, Supabase, Baseten) speaks for itself. Excited to see who's next. Would love to connect.

name: Ed Sim
note: Hi Ed, congrats on Boldstart's $250M Fund VII. Your inception-stage conviction around the autonomous enterprise really resonates with me. I'm excited to see the technical founders you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Darian Shirazi
note: Hi Darian, congrats on closing Gradient's $220M fifth fund and spinning out independent. Backing AI-first founders at seed is exactly the frontier I care about, and I'm excited to see who you bet on next. Would love to connect.

name: Ross Fubini
note: Hi Ross, I love how XYZ backs founders in fintech, defense, and the overlooked corners of the economy, now across a $1.2B platform. Your position-velocity-acceleration lens really stuck with me. Excited to see what you fund next. Would love to connect.

name: Sarah Drinkwater
note: Hi Sarah, your conviction that community is the real moat, from Monzo to Depop, resonates deeply with me, and I love that Common Magic II is taking shape. Excited to see the founders you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Camille Ricketts
note: Hi Camille, congrats on making partner at XYZ Venture Capital. After shaping the stories at Notion and First Round, I'm excited to see the product-led founders you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Cristina Cordova
note: Hi Cristina, building Linear's go-to-market while angel investing in 60+ companies like Notion and Canva is such a rare combination. I really admire it, and I'm excited to see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Guillermo Rauch
note: Hi Guillermo, watching Vercel scale toward an IPO while you still angel invest in nearly 100 dev-tool and AI startups is inspiring. Your taste for builders is unmatched, and I'm excited to see what comes next. Would love to connect.

name: Hadar Dor
note: Hi Hadar, I love your angel focus on consumer, marketplaces, and applied AI, plus hands-on operator work like the Sesame redesign. That builder instinct really shows. Excited to see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Logan Kilpatrick
note: Hi Logan, what you're building with AI Studio and the Gemini API is putting real power into developers' hands, and I love following it. I'm excited to see where you take it next, and what you back as an angel. Would love to connect.

name: Art Levy
note: Hi Art, I've admired how you've built Brex's partnerships and embedded strategy from the ground up as CBO. Your fintech angel bets are just as sharp, and I'm excited to see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Scott Belsky
note: Hi Scott, watching you jump from Adobe into A24 and spin up A24 Labs on AI-generated storytelling has been so fun to follow. I'm genuinely excited to see where you take it. Would love to connect.

name: Charles Hudson
note: Hi Charles, I love how Precursor backs people over product at the very first check, and closing Fund V to keep doing it at that pace is inspiring. Excited to see who you bet on next. Would love to connect.

name: Eric Bahn
note: Hi Eric, the way Hustle Fund goes hilariously early and opened Angel Squad to thousands of new investors is something I really admire. With Fund III underway, I'm excited to see what's next. Would love to connect.

name: Mike Maples Jr.
note: Hi Mike, Pattern Breakers reshaped how I think about inflections and idea-shaping at Floodgate, and now you're a YC Visiting Partner too. I'm excited to see the founders you champion next. Would love to connect.

name: Jordan Singer
note: Hi Jordan, from Diagram into Figma and now building Mainframe to make software proactive instead of reactive, you keep chasing the boldest ideas. I'm excited to see what you ship. Would love to connect.

name: Jack McClelland
note: Hi Jack, Afore's conviction to back founders truly pre-product is rare, and launching the Afore x Gamma Ideas to Reality fund after Gamma grew into a $2B company is a great story. Excited to see what's next. Would love to connect.

name: Yohei Nakajima
note: Hi Yohei, Untapped's build-in-public approach plus your work on BabyAGI kicking off the whole autonomous-agent wave is such a rare combo. I'm excited to see what you build and back next. Would love to connect.

name: Rex Woodbury
note: Hi Rex, congrats on closing $100M in new Daybreak funds. I love how Digital Native reads where the next generation is heading, and I'm genuinely excited to see the founders you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Meka Asonye
note: Hi Meka, congrats on launching Prist Capital after your run at First Round. Having helped build sales at Stripe and Mixpanel, you bring rare operator depth to seed, and I'm excited to see who you back first. Would love to connect.

name: Jenny Fielding
note: Hi Jenny, I admire how you've grown Everywhere Ventures into a global pre-seed fund powered by 500+ founder and operator LPs. Backing people that early takes real conviction, and I'm excited to see what's next. Would love to connect.

name: Harry Stebbings
note: Hi Harry, congrats on the $400M 20VC Fund III and launching 20VC Early and Explorer. The way you've turned honest founder conversations into a real platform is inspiring, and I'm excited to see what you build next. Would love to connect.

name: Carmen Alfonso Rico
note: Hi Carmen, I love that Cocoa acts like an in-house angel for European founders instead of getting in the way. Your Super Angel Program bringing more women onto cap tables is great to see, and I'm excited for what's next. Would love to connect.

name: Erica Wenger
note: Hi Erica, I love the Park Rangers thesis of backing elephant companies that turn customers into members. Building it in public as a solo GP is inspiring, and I'm excited to see the founders you fund next. Would love to connect.

name: Andreas Klinger
note: Hi Andreas, congrats on launching PROTOTYPE Fund III. Backing European robotics and physical AI at the earliest stage is exactly where the frontier is heading, and I'm excited to see what you fund next. Would love to connect.

name: Astasia Myers
note: Hi Astasia, I really admire your early conviction in AI and data infrastructure at Felicis, from Datology to Assort Health. You tend to see infra before it's obvious, and I'm excited to see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Mark Ghermezian
note: Hi Mark, I love what you're building at m]x[v, backing tenacious B2B founders the way you built Braze from zero to IPO. Your operator-first approach really resonates with me, and I'm excited to see the next cloud companies you back. Would love to connect.

name: Ryan Hoover
note: Hi Ryan, congrats on Weekend Fund IV and opening early-stage venture to US retail investors. That access-first thinking is exactly the future I want to see, and I can't wait to watch what you and Vedika back next. Would love to connect.

name: Christian Reber
note: Hi Christian, I admire what you're doing with Interface Capital, most recently backing Willo, all while building Superlist. Backing founders as one yourself is rare, and I'm excited to see where you take both. Would love to connect.

name: Ashley Mayer
note: Hi Ashley, Coalition's model of putting top women operators onto cap tables is one of the smartest things I've seen in venture. I'm genuinely excited to see how the fund grows. Would love to connect.

name: Hunter Walk
note: Hi Hunter, I really admire how you've reinvented Homebrew as an evergreen fund investing your own capital, and how Screendoor backs the next generation of VCs. That long-term, founder-first mindset is inspiring. Would love to connect.

name: Katie Stanton
note: Hi Katie, congrats on Moxxie's $95M third fund. I love that you back early-stage founders across such a wide range, and after your run from Twitter to Google to VC, I'm excited to see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Kartik Talwar
note: Hi Kartik, what you've built with ETHGlobal for 100k+ Ethereum developers is incredible, and I love that you're now backing early crypto protocols at A.Capital. I'm excited to see the founders you get behind next. Would love to connect.

name: Reed McBride
note: Hi Reed, congrats on the first close of Mintaka Fund II. I love your focus on pre-seed founders in B2B SaaS, fintech, and applied AI with real asymmetric upside. Excited to see who you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Yana Welinder
note: Hi Yana, congrats on leading AI at Amplitude after building Kraftful all the way to an acquisition. I love how you turn messy product feedback into real intelligence, and I'm excited to see what you build and back next. Would love to connect.

name: Varadh Jain
note: Hi Varadh, I really admire how you back founders on missions only they can pull off, drawing on everything you learned scaling Opendoor and Polymail. Excited to see who you champion next. Would love to connect.

name: Adam Draper
note: Hi Adam, love that Boost VC is going all in on bio and frontier tech at pre-seed, 50-plus bio companies and counting. As a first-check believer myself, I'm excited to see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Evan Charles
note: Hi Evan, I have a lot of respect for investors who back founders early and roll up their sleeves right beside them. I'd love to follow your work and see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Neal Mintz
note: Hi Neal, congrats on stepping up to VP at Wischoff. I love the fund's bet on automating the real-world economy across money, movement, and manufacturing. Excited to see the deals you lead next. Would love to connect.

name: Sarah Catanzaro
note: Hi Sarah, I've long followed your work backing machine intelligence and data infra founders at Amplify, and Projects To Know is a gem. Excited to see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Andrew Milich
note: Hi Andrew, congrats on joining xAI to rebuild Grok's coding tools after scaling Cursor and founding Skiff. I've admired your work since Skiff, and I'm excited to see what you ship next. Would love to connect.

name: Bryce Roberts
note: Hi Bryce, I love the Indie ethos, more A24 than a16z, backing founders toward profitability with no board seat required. Excited to see the companies Indie Fund I backs next. Would love to connect.

name: Colin Gardiner
note: Hi Colin, congrats on closing Yonder Fund I to back overlooked marketplace founders. After your operating years at Outdoorsy, I love that you're writing those first pre-seed checks. Excited to see who you find next. Would love to connect.

name: Akshay Kothari
note: Hi Akshay, what you've built at Notion since employee number eight is remarkable. As it keeps expanding, I really admire how thoughtfully you've scaled the operating side. Excited to see where you take it and what you back. Would love to connect.

name: Sam Lessin
note: Hi Sam, I've loved watching Slow lean into backing individual creators and founders directly, not just software. Your take that old moats aren't moats anymore stuck with me. Excited to see what you fund next. Would love to connect.

name: James Tamplin
note: Hi James, from building Firebase to now backing early dev-tools and climate founders at Founder Collective, your builder's eye really shows. I love that you're on boards like Shortwave and Charm. Excited to see what you back next. Would love to connect.

name: Romain Huet
note: Hi Romain, the developer experience you're crafting at OpenAI is setting the bar for how builders adopt AI. After your platform work at Stripe, I love how much care you put into the tools. Excited to see what you ship next. Would love to connect.

name: Nikunj Kothari
note: Hi Nikunj, I love that you joined FPV to back unreasonably deep founders from a founder's point of view. After your product years at Opendoor and Meter, your operator lens is a real edge. Excited to see who you invest in next. Would love to connect.
